---
title: "Harriet Frances Thynne Lady Charles"
---

## Harriet Frances Thynne Lady Charles

**Dates:** (1816-1881)

**Maiden name:** (Bagot)

### Description

author of novels as Lady Charles Thynne and contributor to <i>MP</i>

### Letters

- Letter from [24 February 1877] 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
